requirement_topic.en: EDD Grid Connection — IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 Evidence and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: EDD并网——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: EDD併網——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Electricite de Djibouti (EDD) is the practical utility gate for grid-connected PV inverter projects in Djibouti. Publicly accessible PV-inverter-specific interconnection rules are limited, so exporters should obtain project-specific EDD connection conditions and Ministry of Energy or project-owner technical requirements before finalising equipment. The international evidence package should be prepared around IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface characteristics, applicable IEC 61000 power-quality limits, and site commissioning settings. Djibouti's commonly cited low-voltage grid is 230/400 V at 50 Hz: frequency is the same as China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V.
summary.zh: Electricite de Djibouti（EDD）是吉布提并网光伏逆变器项目的实际公用事业接入关口。公开可取得的光伏逆变器专项并网规则有限，因此出口商在最终确定设备前，应取得项目专属EDD接入条件以及能源部或项目业主技术要求。国际证据包应围绕IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公共电网接口特性、适用IEC 61000电能质量限值及现场调试参数准备。吉布提常见低压电网为230/400 V、50 Hz：频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。
summary.zht: Electricite de Djibouti（EDD）是吉布地併網光伏逆變器項目的實際公用事業接入關口。公開可取得的光伏逆變器專項併網規則有限，因此出口商在最終確定設備前，應取得項目專屬EDD接入條件以及能源部或項目業主技術要求。國際證據包應圍繞IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公共電網介面特性、適用IEC 61000電能品質限值及現場調試參數準備。吉布地常見低壓電網為230/400 V、50 Hz：頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。

standards_or_laws: EDD project-specific grid-connection conditions where applicable
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality limits as specified by EDD or the project owner
Djibouti low-voltage grid expectation: 230/400 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These files are prepared for Chinese grid-operator acceptance and China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz low-voltage baseline. They are not automatically accepted by EDD or Djibouti project owners as IEC 62116 or IEC 61727 evidence and do not prove that firmware settings have been validated for Djibouti's 230/400 V network.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述文件面向中国电网运营商认可及中国220/380 V、50 Hz低压基准。它们不会被EDD或吉布提项目业主自动接受为IEC 62116或IEC 61727证据，也不能证明固件参数已针对吉布提230/400 V网络验证。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。上述文件面向中國電網運營商認可及中國220/380 V、50 Hz低壓基準。它們不會被EDD或吉布地項目業主自動接受為IEC 62116或IEC 61727證據，也不能證明韌體參數已針對吉布地230/400 V網路驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid documents are not a substitute for EDD project connection review. Exporters should obtain EDD written connection conditions, prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 reports for the supplied inverter model, map applicable IEC 61000 power-quality evidence, document the Djibouti firmware profile, and validate protection thresholds, reconnection delays, and commissioning tests for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Djibouti voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency aligns; the voltage differs.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件不能替代EDD项目接入审查。出口商应取得EDD书面接入条件，为所供应逆变器型号准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727报告，映射适用IEC 61000电能质量证据，记录吉布提固件配置，并针对230/400 V、50 Hz验证保护阈值、重连延迟和调试测试。不得将吉布提电压描述为与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率一致，电压不同。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件不能替代EDD項目接入審查。出口商應取得EDD書面接入條件，為所供應逆變器型號準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727報告，映射適用IEC 61000電能品質證據，記錄吉布地韌體配置，並針對230/400 V、50 Hz驗證保護閾值、重連延遲和調試測試。不得將吉布地電壓描述為與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率一致，電壓不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for any EDD-connected project; exact documentary requirements are project-specific and must be confirmed with EDD, the Ministry of Energy, and the project owner
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid-operator requirements but does not transfer to Djibouti EDD connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EDD project connection conditions as the controlling grid gate for Djibouti. Chinese GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 files are useful engineering background only and are not automatically accepted. Prepare IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and applicable IEC 61000 evidence, then validate inverter firmware for Djibouti's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. Frequency matches China, but voltage differs from China's 220/380 V.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将EDD项目接入条件视为吉布提的控制性并网关口。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024文件仅可作为工程背景，不会被自动接受。请准备IEC 62116、IEC 61727及适用IEC 61000证据，并针对吉布提230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证逆变器固件。频率与中国一致，但电压不同于中国220/380 V。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將EDD項目接入條件視為吉布地的控制性併網關口。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024文件僅可作為工程背景，不會被自動接受。請準備IEC 62116、IEC 61727及適用IEC 61000證據，並針對吉布地230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證逆變器韌體。頻率與中國一致，但電壓不同於中國220/380 V。
